title: Gammaeon Mini Cube Keychain, Multicolor, Plastic, Sequential Puzzle, Keychain Style, 1 Count
features: Compact Puzzle: This speed cube keychain is a miniaturised version of the classic 3x3x3 puzzle cube, making it a perfect portable fidget toy.
Sequential Solving: The colourful cube can be twisted and turned to align the colours, providing an engaging sequential puzzle challenge.
Keychain Design: Featuring a keyring attachment, this cube can be conveniently carried on a keychain or bag for on-the-go entertainment.
Gift Idea: With its unique and fun concept, this cube keychain makes an excellent gift for puzzle enthusiasts or anyone seeking a stimulating handheld game.
description: Product Description Cube Keychain, Speed Cube Keychain, Mini Cube For Cube Gift Keychain Unleash your inner puzzle master with this captivating cube keychain! Crafted to perfection, this miniature cube offers a delightful challenge for your fingers and mind. Designed as a sequential puzzle, it allows you to twist and turn the layers, testing your problem-solving skills and dexterity.
